title: Risotto Stock Ratio Calculator
explanation: Adjusting the rice‑to‑stock proportion controls creaminess and prevents overflow, ensuring perfect risotto texture.

title: Risotto Recipe Scaler
explanation: Changing the serving size updates ingredient quantities and total cooking time.

cells:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def compute():
    total_time = 20 + (servings/4) * 5
    rice_cups = 1 * (servings/4)
    stock_cups = 2 * (servings/4)
    shallots_cups = 0.5 * (servings/4)
    xs = np.arange(1, 10)
    ys = 20 + (xs/4) * 5
    plt.plot(xs, ys)
    plt.xlabel('Servings')
    plt.ylabel('Total Time (min)')
    plt.title('Risotto Cooking Time vs Servings')
    plt.show()
    print(f'Total time: {total_time} min')
    print(f'Rice: {rice_cups} cups')
    print(f'Stock: {stock_cups} cups')
    print(f'Shallots: {shallots_cups} cups')

compute()
